skills.description: Run the tech-news ingestion pipeline and emit a structured report of what was added to raw/research/news.

inputs.description: Which source script to run: 'tech-news' (default), 'trending', 'dair-papers', or 'dair-agent'.
inputs.name: source

inputs.description: If true, list the URLs the script would fetch without writing to disk.
inputs.name: dry_run

skills.name: ingest-tech-news

outputs.description: { added: string[], skipped: string[], errors: string[], ms: number }
outputs.name: report

outputs.description: Suggested follow-up skills to run (e.g. 'norma/policy-review' on a new RFP)
outputs.name: next_actions

skills.description: Summarise the Knowledge Prime fulfillment metrics into a daily digest with cost, latency and cache-hit rollups.

inputs.description: Lookback window in hours. Defaults to 24.
inputs.name: window_hours

skills.name: prime-metrics-digest

outputs.description: Human-readable digest with totals, top queries, anomalies
outputs.name: digest

skills.description: Review a markdown document against Wany policy and flag clauses that need human attention.

inputs.description: Full text of the document to review (contract, ToS, RFP answer, etc.)
inputs.name: document

inputs.description: Optional list of decision-ids from decisions/ to anchor the review
inputs.name: policy_refs

skills.name: policy-review

outputs.description: Array of { clause, severity, rationale, suggested_fix }
outputs.name: findings

outputs.description: One-paragraph TL;DR for a human reviewer
outputs.name: summary
